The [[Luminous Bantha]] was a 30 centimeter tall exact replica of a [[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]]. It was carved from a single piece of [[Glow Stone|glow stone]] and was thought to have been built by the [[Dim-U/Legends|Dim-U]] priests. This is in fact false; the statue was actually hiding a [[Datacard/Legends|data card]] in the very center of it, though it could not be seen due to the stones natural glow. What was on the card was a mystery, but it was wanted by many people, including members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The original carrier of the statue was smuggling the information on the data card to its intended target when circumstances forced him to leave the statue on a bench in a dark corner of [[Moko's Cantina]]. The statue was then found by [[Moko Jax]], who displayed it proudly on the counter behind his bar. Though it was only there for a week, it served as a good conversation starter for his patrons. Fortunately for the newly formed [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Bantha and its data card were recovered by a group of Republic agents who delivered it to the intended target.
